query:
SELECT a.id, a.workerId, 
       DATE_FORMAT(a.weekStartDate, '%Y-%m-%d') as week_start,
       DATE_FORMAT(a.weekEndDate, '%Y-%m-%d') as week_end,
       a.confirmedAt IS NOT NULL as is_confirmed
FROM availability a
JOIN workers w ON a.workerId = w.id
WHERE w.name LIKE '%穆伊娜%' OR w.name LIKE '%INA%'
ORDER BY a.weekStartDate DESC;
